sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Adequacy of Price and Process in Proposed Sale of Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
feed.summary: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (KSF) is investigating the proposed sale of Terns Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TERN) to Merck (NYSE: MRK) for $53.00 per share in cash. KSF is evaluating whether the consideration and the process leading to it are adequate, suspecting the offer might undervalue the company. Shareholders are encouraged to contact KSF if they believe the transaction undervalues Terns Pharmaceuticals or to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: ITW Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works Inc. (ITW) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CDT. Following the release, the company will host an earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT, providing details for participants to join. Presentation materials and an audio webcast replay will be available on their investor relations website, with an audio-only replay accessible for a limited time via dial-in numbers.

feed.title: Monday brings new ulcerative colitis trial results from Spyre
feed.summary: Spyre Therapeutics will host a conference call on April 13, 2026, to announce the topline results from Part A induction of its SKYLINE trial for SPY001 in moderate-to-severe ulcerative colitis patients. This announcement follows a series of steady advancements in Spyre's pipeline and corporate agenda, including strong 2025 financial results and multiple planned proof-of-concept readouts for 2026. The company holds a significant cash balance and has an active S-3 shelf registration for potential future financing.

feed.title: China Approves Amgen's Tarlatamab for Previously Treated Extensive-Stage Small Cell Lung Cancer | PharmExec
feed.summary: China's National Medical Products Administration has approved Amgen's tarlatamab (Imdelltra) for adult patients with extensive-stage small cell lung cancer that has progressed after platinum-based chemotherapy. This approval, following FDA approval in 2025, is based on Phase II DeLLphi-301 study data showing significant objective response rates and median overall survival. The article also discusses a 23andMe study on genetic predictors for GLP-1 weight loss efficacy and side effects, and an interview with Phenomix CEO Mark Bagnall regarding the complex realities and hidden costs of GLP-1 usage.

feed.title: TrustCo to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on April 21, 2026; Conference Call on April 22, 2026
feed.summary: TrustCo Bank Corp NY (TRST) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 results after the market closes on April 21, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results will be held at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on April 22, 2026, with details provided for participation and replay. The earnings press release and other company information will be available on TrustCo's Investor Relations website.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy prices tender offers for senior notes
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy Inc. announced the pricing for tender offers to purchase its outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. The company will pay $825.60 per $1,000 principal for the 2051 notes and $802.42 per $1,000 principal for the 2052 notes, with the offers expiring on April 10, 2026. The transaction is expected to settle on April 13, 2026, involving major financial institutions as dealer managers.

feed.title: Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) Given New $245.00 Price Target at JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) to $245.00 from $233.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a potential upside of approximately 14.5% from the previous closing price. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates with $1.76 EPS and also provided a positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Boosts GFL Environmental (NYSE:GFL) Price Target to $49.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for GFL Environmental (NYSE:GFL) from $48.00 to $49.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating, indicating a potential upside of 13.66% from its previous closing price. This adjustment follows GFL Environmental beating quarterly EPS estimates but missing revenue expectations, with multiple other analysts also offering varied recommendations and price targets. The company's stock currently trades around $43.11 with a P/E ratio of 6.33 and an average analyst target of $56.78, signifying a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

feed.title: Intel Stock Gains 50% in 8 Days. Why the Company Has a ‘Renewed Lease on Life.’
feed.summary: Intel's stock has surged 50% over eight consecutive trading sessions, driven by significant announcements. Analysts believe the company is experiencing a "renewed lease on life" and anticipate further positive developments. This winning streak marks a notable turnaround for Intel.

feed.title: Diamondback sets cash terms for 2051 and 2052 debt buybacks
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ: FANG) announced the pricing of its tender offers for any and all of its outstanding 4.400% Senior Notes due 2051 and 4.250% Senior Notes due 2052. The consideration per $1,000 principal amount is $825.60 for the 2051 notes and $802.42 for the 2052 notes, with a settlement date of April 13, 2026. The offers expire on April 10, 2026, with guaranteed delivery deadlines and payment timings extending to April 14-15, 2026.

feed.title: Walmart vs. Costco: Which Store Actually Has Better Prices?
feed.summary: A Business Insider comparison by Savannah Born found that Costco offers prices roughly 26 percent cheaper overall than Walmart, primarily due to its bulk pricing model. While some items like eggs and chicken were found to be cheaper at Walmart, Costco generally provided better value per unit for dairy, snacks, and other pantry staples. The article suggests that savvy shoppers might benefit from comparing prices and shopping at both stores to maximize savings.

feed.title: Royal Caribbean Group Schedules Conference Call for April 30, to Discuss its Q1 Financial Results, Offering New Insights into Performance and Future Plans
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group will host a conference call on April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET to discuss its first-quarter 2026 financial results. This call will offer insights into the company's performance, future growth strategies, and how it plans to navigate economic uncertainties and evolving travel trends. Investors and stakeholders can access a live webcast and replay on Royal Caribbean’s investor relations website.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Wells Fargo (WFC) After Its Strong Three Year Run
feed.summary: This article analyzes Wells Fargo (WFC) to determine if its recent strong three-year run still presents a buying opportunity. Using an Excess Returns model, Wells Fargo appears undervalued by 34.1% with an intrinsic value of about US$130.46 per share. The P/E ratio analysis also suggests it's trading below its proprietary "Fair Ratio," indicating undervaluation, while also presenting bull and bear case narratives for investor consideration.

feed.title: A Look At Texas Instruments (TXN) Valuation After A High Profile Analyst Upgrade To Buy
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) recently received a high-profile analyst upgrade to Buy, driven by expected stronger free cash flow, margin improvements, and an anticipated analog semiconductor upcycle. While one narrative suggests TXN is 31.6% undervalued with a fair value of $314.44 due to its capacity expansion suppressing current free cash flow but enhancing long-term competitive position, another discounted cash flow model indicates the stock is overvalued at $165.18 per share. Investors are encouraged to review both perspectives to determine their own stance on TXN's valuation.

feed.title: Stifel raises FedEx stock price target to $442 on freight spin-off
feed.summary: Stifel has increased its price target for FedEx Corp. (NYSE:FDX) to $442 from $425, maintaining a Buy rating, due to the upcoming spin-off of its freight division. The firm notes that FedEx Freight, expected to become a standalone less-than-truckload operator by June 2026, is North America's largest and most-scaled provider. This separation is anticipated to enhance operational focus and unlock valuation upside for FedEx.

feed.title: Acquittal in Pasadena Murder That Marked ShotSpotter’s First Fatal Detection
feed.summary: A Los Angeles jury has acquitted Avery Lavon Bennett of murder charges in the 2022 shooting death of Eric Lynn Thomas, the first fatal detection by Pasadena's ShotSpotter system. Bennett subsequently pleaded no contest to a weapons charge, was sentenced to time served, and released. The prosecution's case relied on circumstantial evidence, which the defense successfully challenged.

feed.title: STLA INVESTOR ALERT: Stellantis N.V. Investors with Substantial Losses Have Opportunity to Lead Class Action Lawsuit
feed.summary: Robbins Geller Rudman & Dowd LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Stellantis N.V. (NYSE: STLA) on behalf of investors who purchased common stock between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis made misleading statements regarding its electrification market opportunities and potential for earnings growth, failing to disclose significant restructuring charges. This announcement follows a substantial drop in Stellantis's stock price after the company disclosed €22.2 billion in charges related to a business "reset."

feed.title: Uber more than doubles Seattle-area footprint with major office lease
feed.summary: Uber has significantly expanded its Seattle-area presence by leasing a major office space at Four106 in downtown Bellevue, more than doubling its footprint. This expansion follows rumors from July regarding the company seeking over 100,000 square feet of additional space. The move indicates Uber's continued growth and investment in the Puget Sound region.

feed.title: Illinois Tool Works sets April 30 webcast for first-quarter results
feed.summary: Illinois Tool Works (ITW) will release its first quarter 2026 results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 7:00 a.m. CDT, followed by an earnings webcast at 9:00 a.m. CDT. Investors can access the webcast or conference call, with replay and presentation materials available online. The announcement includes previous financial performance, guidance for 2026, and details on how to join the upcoming call.

feed.title: F5 Inc stock (US3156161024): Is its multi-cloud security edge strong enough for U.S. investor upside
feed.summary: F5 Inc. is positioned to benefit from the growing demand for cybersecurity solutions in multi-cloud environments, especially given the escalating cyber threats in U.S. enterprises. The company specializes in application security and delivery, offering a full-stack security suite that addresses modern threats at the application layer. Analysts view F5 positively because of its recurring revenue growth potential and its leadership in app security, despite acknowledging execution risks in its software transition.

feed.title: How Adobe is Involved in SJSU Careers | SJSU NewsCenter | SJSU
feed.summary: San José State University (SJSU) has partnered with Adobe to enhance career opportunities and digital literacy for its students and faculty. This collaboration has led to the creation of the Elevate Career Hub, which offers workshops, resources, and support in digital storytelling and professional software skills. The initiative aims to equip Spartans with essential tools and knowledge to succeed in the modern job market.

feed.title: NiSource Inc. stock (US65473P1057): Is its regulated utility model resilient enough for U.S. energy shifts?
feed.summary: NiSource Inc., a major regulated utility in the U.S. Midwest, operates natural gas distribution and electric transmission networks, serving millions of customers. The company's regulated business model offers predictable cash flows and stability for investors, making it a defensive holding amid market volatility. NiSource's strategic focus on infrastructure modernization, cleaner energy and leveraging rising electricity demand from data centers and EVs positions it for continued growth and aligns with national energy reliability and infrastructure development.

feed.title: Amazon.com Inc. stock (US0231351067): Is AWS growth strong enough to unlock new upside?
feed.summary: This article examines whether Amazon's AWS growth can drive new gains for investors amidst evolving market conditions. It highlights Amazon's dual business model of e-commerce and high-margin cloud computing, positioning it as a resilient tech play. The piece also discusses Amazon's competitive advantages, industry drivers, analyst views, and potential risks, offering U.S. investors insights into the stock's potential and challenges.

feed.title: [144] AUTOZONE INC SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article details an SEC Form 144 filing by AutoZone Inc. (AZO) on April 10, 2026, disclosing a proposed sale of 50 shares of common stock by an individual, acquired through restricted stock vesting as compensation. The filing indicates a "Neutral" impact and sentiment and provides details about the securities to be sold and information about the filer.

feed.title: SS&C to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, after market close. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The news release and webcast details will be available on the company's investor relations website.

feed.title: SS&C to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, April 23, 2026. This will be followed by an earnings conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss the results. SS&C is a global provider of financial services and healthcare software and services.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Joseph J. Russo, EVP & President of Global Networks & Technology for Verizon Communications, received a grant of 80.976 phantom stock units valued at $13.63 per unit. These units, which are economically tied to Verizon common stock but settled in cash, were awarded under a deferred compensation plan. This transaction increases Russo's total phantom stock holdings to 81,612.535 units, including those acquired through dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: SS&C to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings
feed.summary: SS&C Technologies Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SSNC) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Thursday, April 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results is scheduled for 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Investors can access the news release, webcast, and replay through SS&C's investor relations website.

feed.title: Verizon (NYSE: VZ) EVP Kyle Malady granted new phantom stock units
feed.summary: Verizon EVP Kyle Malady was granted 127.53 unitized phantom stock units at an indicated value of $13.63 each through a deferred compensation plan. This transaction, which is a routine compensation award, increased his indirect phantom stock holdings to 410,769.153 units. These phantom units are tied to Verizon's common stock but are settled in cash and are not open-market stock purchases.

feed.title: Bristol-Myers Squibb Poised for In-Line Q1 Amid One-Off Volatility, RBC Says
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets expects Bristol-Myers Squibb to report in-line first-quarter results despite some one-off revenue and earnings volatility. The firm forecasts modest upside potential from cancer drug Revlimid and multiple myeloma treatment Abecma, but also anticipates a negative impact from lower COVID-19 antibody sales. RBC reiterated its Outperform rating and $83 price target for the stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERIZON COMMUNICATIONS INC Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Verizon Communications executive Samantha Hammock received a grant of 72.511 unitized phantom stock units under a deferred compensation plan, with each unit valued at $13.63. These units are settled in cash and represent an economic equivalent of a portion of common stock. After this transaction, her total phantom stock balance in the plan is 35,329.157 units, held indirectly and including dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Verizon (NYSE: VZ) director receives cash-settled phantom stock grant
feed.summary: Verizon's director and CEO, Daniel H. Schulman, was granted 195.245 cash-settled phantom stock units through a deferred compensation plan, valued at $13.63 per unit. This award increases his indirect holdings in the plan to 6,979.007 units, which include amounts accumulated from dividend reinvestment. These phantom units are economically tied to Verizon common stock but are settled in cash upon specific events.

feed.title: Progressive Corp Stock (PGR) Moved Down by 3.04% on Apr 10: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Progressive Corp (PGR) saw its stock decline by 3.04% on April 10, influenced by recent analyst price target reductions and concerns over its financial outlook. Analysts cited increased competition, inflationary pressures, and potentially optimistic auto premium estimates. Investor focus is on the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report and rising underwriting costs, which contributed to the downward movement.

feed.title: Ameriprise advisor channels to consolidate under one leader as veteran exec retires
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial is consolidating oversight of its employee and independent contractor advisor businesses under a single executive, Bill Williams, following the retirement of veteran Pat O'Connell. Williams, who has led the independent contractor channel since 2008, will now oversee both primary advisor units, the financial institutions group, and advisor recruiting. This strategic reorganization occurs during a period of strong performance in Ameriprise's wealth management arm.

feed.title: Ulta Spring Haul Sale: MAC, Rare Beauty and More for up to 40% Off
feed.summary: Ulta's Spring Haul event offers significant discounts of up to 40% off on popular beauty brands like MAC, Rare Beauty, and La Roche-Posay. The sale, which runs until April 18th, includes deals on makeup, skincare, and haircare products, as well as buy one, get one 50% off specials. The article highlights several top picks across various categories, emphasizing editor-loved items and trending products.

feed.title: Fair Isaac Stock Is Getting Thrashed. Why It’s a Bad Day for Credit Bureaus.
feed.summary: Fair Isaac (FICO) stock experienced a significant plunge on Friday, positioning it as one of the S&P 500's worst performers. This decline put the company, which provides the widely used FICO score, on track for its lowest closing price since late 2023. The article suggests it was a challenging day for credit bureaus in general.

feed.title: Gartner Faces Investor Lawsuit Over Alleged Misstatements on Contract Value Growth and Consulting Revenue
feed.summary: Gartner (IT) is facing a federal securities lawsuit alleging that the company and its executives made misleading statements regarding contract value growth rates and consulting segment revenues. The lawsuit, filed on March 17, 2026, covers investors who purchased Gartner stock between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The complaint claims that Gartner's statements about accelerating growth and achieving double-digit gains were overly optimistic, leading to significant stock drops after corrective disclosures in August 2025 and February 2026.

feed.title: Robbins LLP Reminds SMR Investors of the Pending Class
feed.summary: Robbins LLP is reminding investors of NuScale Power Corporation (NYSE: SMR) Class A shares about a pending class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that NuScale misled investors regarding its business prospects, specifically concerning its partnership with ENTRA1 Energy LLC, which reportedly lacked relevant experience. Shareholders who bought shares between May 13, 2025, and November 6, 2025, are affected, and the lead plaintiff deadline to submit papers is April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Why Simply Good Foods Stock Just Had Its Worst Day in Years
feed.summary: Simply Good Foods (SMPL) stock plunged over 18% after missing revenue estimates and lowering full-year guidance. The company faces increased competition for its Quest brand and struggles with its Atkins brand due to the rise of GLP-1 weight loss drugs, coupled with macroeconomic pressures like rising cocoa prices. While the stock may appear cheap, ongoing challenges suggest it is a better short-term trade than a long-term investment.

feed.title: This Semiconductor Stock Is All You Need To Be Buying
feed.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) is highlighted as a dominant force in the global foundry market, controlling 69.9% market share. The article argues that TSM's near-monopoly on premium chip manufacturing for fabless companies like Nvidia and AMD gives it significant pricing power, making it a stronger long-term investment due to its foundational role across the entire semiconductor sector. Despite a higher valuation, TSM's projected sales and EPS growth, along with limited competition, suggest it will outperform the broader market.

feed.title: FedEx and pilots' union announce tentative agreement as federal mediation ends
feed.summary: FedEx and its pilots' union have reached a tentative contract agreement after five years of negotiations and federal mediation. The agreement includes a nearly 40% increase in pilots' hourly wages in 2026, followed by 3% annual raises from 2028 through 2030. This development comes after previous challenges to leadership and picketing by union members.

feed.title: Is Turning Point Brands’ (TPB) Modern Oral Setback Reframing Its Regulatory Risk Narrative?
feed.summary: Turning Point Brands (TPB) is facing increased regulatory scrutiny and an investigation into its Modern Oral nicotine pouch business after the FDA moved to limit fast-tracking of product applications and guidance was lowered. These challenges are prompting a reevaluation of the company's growth prospects and regulatory risk, despite its efforts to build brand presence through partnerships. The article examines how these developments could impact TPB's investment narrative and risk profile, noting that the company's forecast revenue for 2029 is $890.0 million and earnings $163.0 million, with a fair value estimate of $132.50.

feed.title: Teladoc Health, Inc. virtual diabetes prevention boosts engagement among Medicare beneficiaries
feed.summary: Teladoc Health, Inc. reports significant success with its virtual diabetes prevention program for Medicare beneficiaries, showing increased engagement and positive health outcomes. The program, which uses digital health platforms to support weight management and diabetes prevention, aims to reach a broader patient base, especially in older and rural populations. These initiatives are part of Teladoc's wider strategy to use digital health solutions for chronic disease management.

feed.title: A Look At Toronto Dominion Bank's (TSX:TD) Valuation As AI Alliance And Stronger Estimates Support Sentiment
feed.summary: Toronto-Dominion Bank (TSX:TD) shares have seen significant gains over the past year, with recent bond deals and an AI alliance contributing to positive sentiment. Despite being slightly undervalued at CA$137.94 against a fair value of CA$140.43, concerns remain around fintech disruption, regulatory expenses, and exposure to Canadian real estate. Investors are encouraged to review the bank's fundamentals and potential risks, although the article notes that Simply Wall St analysis does not constitute financial advice.

feed.title: Coca-Cola releasing cans with a California-inspired emblem: See it here
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is launching a limited-edition series of 52 mini cans to celebrate America's upcoming 250th birthday, featuring emblems inspired by each state, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico. The cans will highlight iconic local symbols, such as a surfer for California and a block of cheese for Wisconsin. Consumers also have the chance to win prizes, including a new Jeep or collectible pins, through a sweepstakes associated with the America250 partnership.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Stellantis N.V. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Stellantis N.V. for investors who purchased securities between February 26, 2025, and February 5, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Stellantis made false and misleading statements regarding its electrification market opportunities and masked significant restructuring charges, which ultimately led to a 23% stock price drop after a €22.2 billion charge announcement. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss their legal rights.

feed.title: Habit Burger & Grill Unveils Reimagined Dodgers-Inspired Location
feed.summary: The Habit Burger & Grill has reimagined its 2134 W. Sunset Blvd location with a Dodgers-inspired design to celebrate its official partnership with the Los Angeles Dodgers. This renovated "Dodgers x Habit Home Base" features bold blue lighting, team-themed upholstery, vintage photography, and a mural by artist Ali Gonzalez, aiming to create a community hub for fans. The partnership also includes Habit Burger's presence at Dodger Stadium, bringing its award-winning menu to the center field plaza.

feed.title: Xcel Energy Inc stock (US98389B1008): Is its clean energy push strong enough for U.S. investor upside?
feed.summary: Xcel Energy is positioned as a defensive investment in the U.S. utilities sector due to its regulated business model and aggressive push into clean energy. The company aims for 80% carbon-free electricity by 2030 and 100% by 2050, aligning with federal incentives and ESG mandates. Its strategic investments in renewables and grid upgrades, coupled with a focus on high-growth regions, are expected to drive consistent earnings and dividends for U.S. investors.

feed.title: Dover Corp. stock (US25985P1030): Is its diversified industrial model strong enough for steady U.S. investor returns?
feed.summary: Dover Corp. offers U.S. investors exposure to a diversified industrial company with a strong presence in essential equipment for manufacturing, food processing, and energy infrastructure. Its diversified business model, spanning Engineered Products, Clean Energy & Fueling Solutions, Imaging & Identification, and Pumps & Process Solutions, aims to provide stability and consistent cash flows. The company's focus on niche leadership, operational efficiency, and alignment with U.S. industrial growth trends makes it an attractive defensive play for American portfolios, despite potential risks from inflation and cyclical exposure.

feed.title: Republic Services opens upgraded recycling center in Massachusetts
feed.summary: Republic Services has opened its upgraded Peabody Recycling Center in Massachusetts, significantly increasing its processing capacity from 20 to 35-40 tons per hour. The enhancements include new automated sorting equipment, AI-powered technology, and improved safety systems, aimed at boosting sorting precision and supporting the state's waste reduction goals. This investment reinforces Republic Services' commitment to sustainability in the greater Boston community, utilizing technology from Machinex.
